basis: Rolling-year GB import-spend rate per half-hour = max(net interconnector inflow, 0) × GB system sell price (MW × £/MWh = £/h). Export half-hours floor to £0. Indexed by settlement period (local half-hour), last 365 settled days. Settled data: Elexon FUELHH (interconnectors) and Elexon system cash-out price.
source: Elexon FUELHH net interconnector flow × Elexon system (cash-out) price, settled, back to 2016
metric_label: rate at which Britain is paying to import electricity, per half-hour
caveat: Net imported energy valued at the GB system (cash-out) price — not the contractual cost of the imports, which clear in the day-ahead auction.
